Ogrika Tursic Found in Escape Velocity!

Our first gold loot has been found in Escape Velocity! Congratulations to the tester who found the Ogrika Tursic! 

Can you imagine finding an Ogrika Tursic just for helping us test on-chain movement?

Well, stop imagining and try to find yours!  

 | https://sage.staratlas.com/
